office_does: A state senator writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A county commissioner emphasizing family and community priorities faces a long-serving legislator emphasizing fiscal restraint and accountability.

candidates.summary: Mejia is a county commissioner focused on affordable living, education, health care, and family opportunity.
highlights: Emphasizes affordable living, education, and health care [S2]

spending.basis: Her platform emphasizes education, health care, and family opportunity as public priorities.

experience.basis: She has county elected experience but no legislative tenure.

candidates.summary: MacEwen is a long-serving legislator and Senate Republican deputy leader focused on restrained budgeting, accountability, and private-sector growth.
highlights: Opposes the 2026 income tax and recent tax increases [S3]

taxes.basis: He explicitly criticizes the income tax and recent tax increases.

spending.basis: He supports restrained budgeting and criticizes state spending growth.

experience.basis: He has served in the Legislature since 2013 and holds Senate leadership roles.
